_readme: Interview stage enrichment. Keyed by company name — must match the Company column in your Sheet exactly (case-sensitive). Maintained by Claude during day planning and wrap-up when interviews are confirmed. Every human conversation is a round — R1, R2, R3, etc. No Screen/R1 distinction. Valid outcomes: active, rejected, offer, withdrawn.

rounds.notes: Thomas Graf (CPO), informal 1:1 auf Deutsch — rejected
Alexandra Bauert + Daria Caliandro, 45 min panel — rejected
Theo, intro call — withdrawn by candidate (salary gap)
Dominik + Andreas (FDE), technical session — advanced, Strong Hire
Mathias Diener + Edouard Haegi, case study — rejected
Irina Stogova (Head of Talent), 45 min recruiter screen — rejected before R2
